chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.06 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on C.M.A. 1870/2020 For orders on C.M.A. 1871/2020 For orders on C.M.A. 1872/2020 For hearing of main case 29.03.2022 This is a third date of hearing when neither appellants nor their counsel are in attendance. They were called absent on 17.08.2021 followed by 03.02.2022. Today the position is same. Office objections including court fee have not been complied with. It appears that the appellants have lost interest in the proceedings. Dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
